chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.208 of 2024 Muhammad Muawiyah Hilal Versus Ejaz Malik & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 1261/24 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply as at “A” 3. For orders on CMA 1262/24 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on CMA 1263/24 Dated: 30.05.2024 Moulvi Iqbal Haider for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant has pressed to assail before us ad-interim order granted on 13.05.2024. It is claimed that in an earlier suit filed by the appellant an interim order was already operating and perhaps this has overlapped to the extent of his certain rights such as possession. We have heard the learned counsel. It seems to be only a tentative assessment based on the contention of learned counsel appearing for the plaintiff on injunction application and such application would be taken to its logical end after hearing parties and/or their counsels, preferably a month after summer vacation. With this understanding, appeal stands disposed of along with listed applications. Judge Judge
